---
title: Annular Mode-Like Variation in a Multilayer Quasigeostrophic Model
pagetitle: 2012-10-1-Zhang2012 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2012
author: Yang Zhang, Xiu-Qun Yang, Yu Nie and Gang Chen
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 69, 2940--2958, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-0214.1.
recommended_citation: 'Yang Zhang, Xiu-Qun Yang, Yu Nie and Gang Chen, 2012: Annular
  Mode-Like Variation in a Multilayer Quasigeostrophic Model, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric
  Sciences</i>, 69, 2940--2958, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-0214.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-11-0214.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Annular Mode-Like Variation in a Multilayer Quasigeostrophic Model

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2012*

**Recommended citation:** Yang Zhang, Xiu-Qun Yang, Yu Nie and Gang Chen, 2012: Annular Mode-Like Variation in a Multilayer Quasigeostrophic Model, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 69, 2940--2958, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-0214.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-11-0214.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
